---
title: "Course materials"
---

## Textbooks

You are not required to purchase a textbook for this class. Who do we think we are?

In the **PREPARE** column of the [course schedule](https://sta-house-f26.github.io/), we will note which papers are reading for next class.

Note that [here]("https://docs.google.com/document/d/15E3fy6B_9gWY3mt9UxZHZESQ0JgNs_toBIIgD_6ZmTU/edit?usp=sharing") is the signup sheet for the student-led discussion sections.

## Technology

Technology use will be limited during class time to encourage active discussion and participation. However, you will need access to a device with internet so that you can use the following:

-   [This course page](https://sta240-f25.github.io/) that you are on right now;
-   [Canvas](https://go.canvas.duke.edu/), through which you can access...
    -   [Gradescope](https://www.gradescope.com/courses/1071176);
    -   [Ed Discussion](https://edstem.org/us/courses/80868/discussion);
-   [Zoom](https://duke.zoom.us/) (e.g. for remote office hours).

If access to technology becomes a concern for you during the semester, contact the instructors immediately to discuss options.
